title: India among top AI-ready nations, one of world's least concentrated equity markets: J.P. Morgan
description: India has emerged as one of the top countries in artificial intelligence (AI) readiness, trailing only the U.S. and China, while remaining one of the world's least concentrated equity markets, according to a recent report by J.P. Morgan.

title: 'It is a scary thought': Tom Hanks on AI replacing his voice in 'Toy Story' films
description: Tom Hanks expresses concerns about artificial intelligence potentially replicating his voice for future 'Toy Story' films, highlighting the need for quality storytelling in sequels.
content:
Tom Hanks talks about how the thought of AI replacing his voice in 'Toy Story' is a scary thought.

title: Adani AGM Highlights: Gautam Adani Outlines Infrastructure-AI Growth Blueprint
description: Framing the theme of this year's AGM as "Accelerating Infrastructure, Leveraging Intelligence", Adani argued that physical infrastructure and technologies such as artificial intelligence, automation and data centres are increasingly inseparable in shaping economic growth and national competitiveness.
content: Adani Group Chairman Gautam Adani used his annual shareholder address to lay out an ambitious roadmap centred on what he called the twin engines of India's future — infrastructure and intelligence. Framing the theme of this year's AGM as "Acceleratin... [2458 chars]

title: Anthropic launches Claude Tag in Slack with plans for wider rollout

content:

title: US intelligence security agency loses access to Anthropic AI amid government dispute
description: A dispute between Anthropic and the Trump administration has unexpectedly affected one of the US intelligence community's most closely watched AI programmes. The loss of access to Anthropic's advanced models comes as security agencies increasingly rely on artificial intelligence to identify cyber threats, analyse intelligence and strengthen digital defences.
content: The US National Security Agency has been forced to suspend its use of one of the world’s most advanced artificial intelligence systems after a widening dispute between the Trump administration and AI developer Anthropic disrupted access to the compan... [5060 chars]

title: Mamdani proves his power in New York House races, plus more takeaways from Tuesday's primaries
description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani has successfully backed three allies in Democratic U.S. House primaries. The victories highlight the political influence of Mamdani as he tries to reshape his city's politics. Two of his endorsed candidates are democratic socialists like himself. Elsewhere, two opposing factions of the artificial intelligence industry spent millions on a House race that became a proxy fight over tech regulation. And in South Carolina, President Donald Trump endorsed both candidates in a Republican runoff for governor. One of his endorsed candidates inevitably won.
content: WASHINGTON (AP) — New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani waded into Democratic U.S. House primaries to boost three progressives over establishment-backed candidates. All of them won Tuesday, defeating two incumbents and essentially ensuring that two self... [327 chars]

title: The AI trap: firms buy too much tech, too little talent
description: More businesses are investing in artificial intelligence to boost productivity but a leading tech firm says they are not all getting investments right.
content:
Australian businesses are spending too much on artificial intelligence and not enough on the humans in charge of it, costing them investment returns, according to one tech giant.

title: staging ground for tech entrepreneurs building 'physical AI'
description: Artificial intelligence is advancing beyond mere language comprehension. Researchers are now constructing 'world models' that allow AI systems and robots to grasp the physical realm. This initiative is set to enhance AI's ability to navigate intricate environments and foresee the impacts of their actions, leading to the development of advanced robots and engaging virtual realities, sparking significant interest from investors.
